service.name: Infermedica API
service.description_for_ai: AI-powered symptom checker and medical triage API. Identify possible conditions from symptoms. Used by 100+ healthcare companies. Use for preliminary symptom assessment, triage, health apps. Always recommend consulting a doctor.

auth.cost: Free sandbox. Production pricing on request

capabilities.description_for_ai: Extract symptom IDs from natural language text. First step before diagnosis — converts 'I have a headache and fever' into structured symptom evidence.

text.description: Natural language symptom description in any supported language. E.g. 'I have a headache and high fever for 2 days'

age.description: {value: 30, unit: 'year'} — patient age affects symptom relevance

include_tokens.description: Return token-level analysis of which words matched which symptoms

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get possible diagnoses with probability scores based on symptoms. ALWAYS show medical disclaimer. Do not replace professional medical advice.

evidence.description: Symptom evidence from parse endpoint: [{id: 's_21', choice_id: 'present', initial: true}, {id: 's_1190', choice_id: 'absent'}]. choice_id: present|absent|unknown. Set initial:true for patient-reported symptoms.

extras.description: {disable_groups: true} to show individual diagnoses instead of groups

agent_hints.disclaimer: ALWAYS display: 'This is not medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional for diagnosis and treatment.'
agent_hints.flow: 1) parse_symptoms(text) → get symptom IDs. 2) diagnose(sex, age, evidence) → get conditions. 3) Show results with medical disclaimer.
agent_hints.interview_mode: Use should_stop=false + question field to implement conversational symptom interview for more accurate diagnosis.
